Well, Doyle and colleagues (2022) investigated that by employing eye-tracking software to identify precisely where participants were looking the longest when examining thirty faces for attractiveness, trustworthiness, and creepiness.

Another key difference is the level of access to notes and meetings. With the Guest User feature, users only have access to the notes and meetings that they have been invited to. When the server replies, the NAT system does the inverse translation, expecting to deliver the packet to an internal system, but because the mapping is between two routable addresses external to the NAT, the packet is routed by the NAT towards the victim. This can lead to the victim still receiving the attack packet, even though the attacking node does not gain the benefit of amplification.

    In the second failure mode, the NAT system translates the destination address of the response packet back to the original spoofed address and forwards the response back to the Spoofer server, even though the source address would have caused the client's network to discard the packet if the network had deployed SAV.
